attributes.description: Single-pod deep dive with memory decomposition, OOM risk thresholds, per-container resource breakdown, and network I/O.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), names = VALUES(k8s.pod.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " pods"))
| KEEP name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS count = COUNT(*), names = VALUES(k8s.pod.name)
| EVAL name = CASE(count == 1, MV_FIRST(names), CONCAT(TO_STRING(count), " pods"))
| KEEP name

embeddableConfig.description: Name of the pod being inspected.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name), phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Pending",
    phase == 2, "Running",
    phase == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase == 4, "Failed",
    "Unknown"
  )
| KEEP phase

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.pod.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS count = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.pod.name), phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
| EVAL phase = CASE(
    count > 1, "N/A",
    phase == 1, "Pending",
    phase == 2, "Running",
    phase == 3, "Succeeded",
    phase == 4, "Failed",
    "Unknown"
  )
| KEEP phase

embeddableConfig.description: Current lifecycle phase of this pod (Pending, Running, Succeeded, Failed, or Unknown). Displays the phase from the most recently scraped document.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.container.restarts IS NOT NULL
    AND k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_restarts = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
    BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS restarts = SUM(max_restarts)

embeddableConfig.description: Total container restarts for this pod. MAX(k8s.container.restarts).

| KEEP k8s.pod.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.pod.name

allColumns.label: View logs in Discover for pod:

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.pod.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| KEEP k8s.pod.name
| LIMIT 1

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS bucket_util = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(bucket_util), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS bucket_util = AVG(k8s.pod.cpu_limit_utilization)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(bucket_util), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(bucket_util, timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

embeddableConfig.description:
Last CPU limit utilization value for the selected time range. Shows what fraction of the pod's CPU limit is being consumed.

"Last value vs Avg" shows how the most recent reading compares to the time range average. Pods without a CPU limit are excluded (cpu_limit_utilization is only emitted when a limit is set).

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
    `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = SUM(k8s.pod.cpu.usage),
    `CPU requests` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_request),
    `CPU limits` = SUM(k8s.container.cpu_limit)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `CPU usage`, `CPU requests`, `CPU limits`

embeddableConfig.description: CPU usage over time with request (yellow) and limit (red) reference lines.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage vs requests & limits

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization, @timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    utilization = ROUND(AVG(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(LAST(k8s.pod.memory_limit_utilization, @timestamp), 4)
| EVAL max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    `Memory requests` = AVG(k8s.container.memory_request),
    `Memory limits` = AVG(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS `Memory working set` = MAX(`Memory working set`),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(`Memory requests`),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(`Memory limits`)
  BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(`Memory working set`),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(`Memory requests`),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(`Memory limits`)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS `Memory working set` = AVG(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    `Memory requests` = AVG(k8s.container.memory_request),
    `Memory limits` = AVG(k8s.container.memory_limit)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name,
     timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS `Memory working set` = MAX(`Memory working set`),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(`Memory requests`),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(`Memory limits`)
  BY k8s.pod.name, timestamp
| STATS `Memory working set` = SUM(`Memory working set`),
    `Memory requests` = SUM(`Memory requests`),
    `Memory limits` = SUM(`Memory limits`)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Memory working set`, `Memory requests`, `Memory limits`

embeddableConfig.description: Memory working set over time. Yellow = requests, solid red = limits (OOMKill threshold).
embeddableConfig.title: Memory working set vs requests & limits

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cores = SUM(cpu_limit)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cores, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.cpu_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_limit = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cores = SUM(cpu_limit)
| EVAL total_cores = ROUND(total_cores, 2)
| KEEP total_cores

embeddableConfig.description: Total CPU limit (in cores) across all containers in this pod.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
    avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name,
    timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS `Volume Usage` = SUM(cap) - SUM(avail)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Volume Usage`

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
    avail = MAX(k8s.volume.available)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name,
    timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS `Volume Usage` = SUM(cap) - SUM(avail)
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Volume Usage`

embeddableConfig.description: Volume usage (in bytes) over time for this pod, calculated as total capacity minus total available across all attached volumes.
embeddableConfig.title: Volume usage over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| EVAL container_id = CONCAT(k8s.pod.name, "/", k8s.container.name)
| STATS `Container Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(container_id)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Container Count`

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| EVAL container_id = CONCAT(k8s.pod.name, "/", k8s.container.name)
| STATS `Container Count` = COUNT_DISTINCT(container_id)
  BY timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Container Count`

embeddableConfig.description: Number of distinct containers over time, identified by pod name and container name.
embeddableConfig.title: Container count over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_avg = AVG(k8s.volume.available),
    cap_avg = AVG(k8s.volume.capacity),
    avail_last = LAST(k8s.volume.available, @timestamp),
    cap_last = LAST(k8s.volume.capacity, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_avail_avg = SUM(avail_avg),
    total_cap_avg = SUM(cap_avg),
    total_avail_last = SUM(avail_last),
    total_cap_last = SUM(cap_last)
| EVAL utilization = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail_avg) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap_avg), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail_last) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap_last), 4),
    max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.name != ""
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.available IS NOT NULL
| STATS avail_avg = AVG(k8s.volume.available),
    cap_avg = AVG(k8s.volume.capacity),
    avail_last = LAST(k8s.volume.available, @timestamp),
    cap_last = LAST(k8s.volume.capacity, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.uid, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_avail_avg = SUM(avail_avg),
    total_cap_avg = SUM(cap_avg),
    total_avail_last = SUM(avail_last),
    total_cap_last = SUM(cap_last)
| EVAL utilization = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail_avg) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap_avg), 4),
    utilization_last = ROUND(1.0 - TO_DOUBLE(total_avail_last) / TO_DOUBLE(total_cap_last), 4),
    max_value = 1.00
| KEEP utilization, utilization_last, max_value

embeddableConfig.description:
Last disk utilization value for the selected time range. Shows what fraction of the pod's total volume capacity is in use, calculated as (capacity - available) / capacity across all attached volumes.

"Last value vs Avg" shows how the most recent reading compares to the time range average. Stale volumes are excluded using a 5-minute freshness threshold.
embeddableConfig.title: Volume utilization

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_limit = SUM(mem_limit)
| KEEP total_limit

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.memory_limit IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_limit = SUM(mem_limit)
| KEEP total_limit

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap)
| KEEP total_cap

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.volume.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS cap = MAX(k8s.volume.capacity),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.volume.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_cap = SUM(cap)
| KEEP total_cap

embeddableConfig.description: Total volume capacity (in bytes) across all volumes attached to this pod.

query.esql:
TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

TS metrics-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    RSS = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.rss),
    `Working set` = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.working_set),
    Available = SUM(k8s.pod.memory.available)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, RSS, `Working set`, Available

embeddableConfig.description: Memory composition over time. RSS, working set, and available memory as separate series. SUM per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Memory composition

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.network.io IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    `Throughput` = SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io))
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), direction
| EVAL direction = CASE(direction == "receive", "Network In", direction == "transmit", "Network Out", direction)
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, direction, `Throughput`

embeddableConfig.description: Network I/O over time. SUM(RATE(k8s.pod.network.io)) per 1m bucket.
embeddableConfig.title: Network I/O over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    ready_num    = LAST(k8s.container.ready, CASE(k8s.container.ready IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    restarts     = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    cpu_usage    = AVG(container.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws    = AVG(container.memory.working_set),
    cpu_limit    = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    memory_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    last_seen    = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL
    ready = CASE(
      ready_num == 1, "Ready",
      ready_num == 0, "Not Ready",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      memory_limit IS NOT NULL AND memory_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(memory_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name, ready, restarts, cpu_usage, memory_ws, cpu_limit, memory_limit, mem_limit_util
| SORT restarts DESC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    ready_num    = LAST(k8s.container.ready, CASE(k8s.container.ready IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    restarts     = MAX(k8s.container.restarts),
    cpu_usage    = AVG(container.cpu.usage),
    memory_ws    = AVG(container.memory.working_set),
    cpu_limit    = MAX(k8s.container.cpu_limit),
    memory_limit = MAX(k8s.container.memory_limit),
    last_seen    = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen)
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL
    ready = CASE(
      ready_num == 1, "Ready",
      ready_num == 0, "Not Ready",
      "Unknown"),
    restarts = COALESCE(restarts, 0),
    mem_limit_util = CASE(
      memory_limit IS NOT NULL AND memory_limit > 0,
        ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(memory_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(memory_limit), 4),
      NULL)
| KEEP k8s.pod.name, k8s.container.name, ready, restarts, cpu_usage, memory_ws, cpu_limit, memory_limit, mem_limit_util
| SORT restarts DESC

embeddableConfig.description: Container listing with ready status, restarts, CPU/memory usage, limits, and memory limit utilization.
embeddableConfig.title: Containers

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = AVG(container.cpu.usage)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.container.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.container.name, `CPU usage`

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.pod.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.container.name IS NOT NULL
  AND container.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL
| STATS `CPU usage` = AVG(container.cpu.usage)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.container.name
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, k8s.container.name, `CPU usage`

embeddableConfig.description: CPU usage per container. avg(container.cpu.usage) broken down by k8s.container.name.
embeddableConfig.title: CPU usage by container

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Pod Detail
